name: Green Chile Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake pie shell for 5 minutes at 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Place the combined Romano-Monterey Jack, Cheddar, and diced chilies in the pie shell.
3. In a separate bowl, beat together half and half, eggs, and salt until well blended.
4. Pour the beaten mixture over the cheese and chilies in the crust.
5. Sprinkle the grated cheese evenly on top.
6. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
7. Allow to stand for 15 minutes before serving.
